title: eleocharis carniolica
intro: Eleocharis carniolica, also known as the Alpine Spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. It is native to Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
